Description:
Dev change specs: Create Country Inn metadata/content clusters that combine "US traveler + Europe destination + business need + leisure need + amenity + booking constraint." For example: "Country Inn hotels for US business travelers in Europe with free breakfast, Wi-Fi, meeting access, and weekend sightseeing nearby." Apply this to title/meta where appropriate, first-screen copy, FAQ blocks, and hotel page modules.

SEO/GEO rationale: Page answers multi-intent travel subqueries generated by AI Mode/query fan-out: Title, meta description, headings, and body copy cover at least three linked sub-intents such as city/region, hotel type, meeting/work amenities, breakfast/parking, leisure proximity, and booking trust.

GEO visibility score: P2 / severity-informed.

Validation steps: Confirm the change is present on https://www.radissonhotels.com/fi-fi/tuotemerkki/country-inn and rerun GEO audit.
